uses: Controls blood sugar in type 2 diabetes by reducing glucose production in the liver.
dosage: 500–2000mg per day with meals. Start low, increase slowly.

uses: Stimulates the pancreas to produce more insulin for type 2 diabetes.
dosage: 5–40mg per day, taken 30 minutes before meals.

uses: Helps control blood sugar by increasing insulin release after meals.
dosage: 100mg once daily. 50mg if moderate kidney disease.

uses: Replaces or supplements natural insulin to control blood sugar in diabetes.
dosage: Dose is highly individualized. Inject subcutaneously as directed.
side_effects: Low blood sugar,Weight gain,Injection site reactions,Hypokalemia

uses: Treats high blood pressure and chest pain (angina) by relaxing blood vessels.
dosage: 2.5–10mg once daily. Take at the same time each day.

uses: Treats high blood pressure and heart failure; protects kidneys in diabetics.
dosage: 5–40mg once daily. Drink plenty of water. Never stop abruptly.

uses: Lowers blood pressure by blocking angiotensin II, protecting the heart and kidneys.
dosage: 25–100mg once or twice daily.

uses: Slows heart rate and reduces blood pressure. Used for hypertension, angina, heart failure.
dosage: 25–200mg daily (immediate release: twice daily; extended release: once daily).

uses: Prevents blood clots in atrial fibrillation, DVT, after valve replacement.
dosage: 2–10mg daily. Requires regular INR blood tests. Dose is individualized.

uses: Relieves pain and fever; low dose prevents heart attacks and strokes.
dosage: Pain: 325–650mg every 4–6 hours. Heart prevention: 75–100mg once daily.

uses: Prevents platelets from clumping to reduce risk of heart attack and stroke.
dosage: 75mg once daily with or without food.

uses: Strengthens heart muscle contractions and controls heart rate in heart failure and AFib.
dosage: 0.125–0.25mg once daily. Requires blood level monitoring.

uses: Removes excess fluid from the body. Treats heart failure, kidney disease, high blood pressure.
dosage: 20–80mg once or twice daily. Take in the morning to avoid night urination.

uses: Controls life-threatening heart rhythm disorders (arrhythmias).
dosage: 100–400mg daily. Requires loading dose. Long-term monitoring required.

uses: Lowers bad cholesterol (LDL) and reduces risk of heart disease and stroke.
dosage: 10–80mg once daily, usually at bedtime. Avoid grapefruit juice.

uses: Lowers LDL cholesterol and triglycerides, reduces cardiovascular risk.
dosage: 5–40mg once daily. Asian patients start at lower dose.

uses: Reduces bad cholesterol and lowers risk of heart attack and stroke.
dosage: 5–40mg once daily at bedtime. Avoid grapefruit.
side_effects: Muscle pain or weakness,Liver problems,Digestive issues

uses: Reduces stomach acid to treat acid reflux, heartburn, and stomach ulcers.
dosage: 20–40mg once daily, taken 30–60 minutes before breakfast.

uses: Treats acid reflux, stomach ulcers, and Zollinger-Ellison syndrome.
dosage: 20–40mg once daily before a meal.

uses: Prevents nausea and vomiting caused by chemotherapy, surgery, or radiation.
dosage: 4–8mg every 8 hours as needed.

uses: Relieves nausea, vomiting, and stomach bloating. Speeds up gastric emptying.
dosage: 10mg three times daily, 15–30 minutes before meals.

uses: Relieves mild to moderate pain and reduces fever. Safe for most people.
dosage: 500–1000mg every 4–6 hours as needed. Max 4000mg per day.
side_effects: Rare at normal doses,Liver damage in overdose

uses: Relieves pain, reduces inflammation, and lowers fever.
dosage: 200–800mg every 4–6 hours. Take with food. Max 3200mg/day.
side_effects: Stomach upset,Kidney stress,Increased blood pressure,Bleeding risk

uses: Treats moderate to severe pain. Acts on opioid receptors and serotonin/norepinephrine.
dosage: 50–100mg every 4–6 hours as needed. Max 400mg/day.

uses: Treats arthritis pain, muscle pain, and menstrual cramps.
dosage: 50mg two to three times daily with food.
side_effects: Stomach pain,Kidney stress,Liver enzyme rise,Cardiovascular risk

uses: Treats bacterial infections like ear infections, pneumonia, and throat infections.
dosage: 250–500mg every 8 hours or 500–875mg every 12 hours. Complete full course.

uses: Treats respiratory infections, skin infections, and STIs caused by bacteria.
dosage: 500mg on day 1, then 250mg once daily for 4 days.

uses: Broad-spectrum antibiotic for urinary, respiratory, and skin infections.
dosage: 250–750mg twice daily. Avoid dairy and antacids within 2 hours.

uses: Treats bacterial and parasitic infections including anaerobic bacteria and H. pylori.
dosage: 400–500mg two to three times daily for 5–10 days.

uses: Treats acne, chest infections, Lyme disease, malaria prevention.
dosage: 100mg twice daily or once daily. Take with plenty of water. Avoid lying down.

uses: Relieves allergy symptoms like sneezing, runny nose, hives, and itching.
dosage: 10mg once daily, usually in the evening.

uses: Prevents asthma attacks and relieves allergic rhinitis (hay fever).
dosage: 10mg once daily in the evening for adults.

uses: Quickly opens airways during asthma attacks or exercise-induced bronchospasm.
dosage: 100–200mcg inhaled as needed, up to 4 times daily.

uses: Reduces inflammation and suppresses the immune system. Used in asthma, arthritis, allergies.
dosage: 5–60mg daily depending on condition. Taper dose slowly; never stop abruptly.
side_effects: Weight gain,High blood sugar,Bone thinning,Increased infection risk,Mood changes

uses: Treats depression, anxiety, OCD, PTSD, and panic disorder.
dosage: 50–200mg once daily. May take 4–6 weeks for full effect.

uses: Treats depression, bulimia, OCD, and panic disorder.
dosage: 20–80mg once daily in the morning. Takes weeks to work.

uses: Short-term relief of anxiety disorders and panic attacks.
dosage: 0.25–1mg three times daily. Use for shortest duration possible.

uses: Controls seizures and panic disorder.
dosage: 0.5–2mg twice or three times daily.

uses: Treats epilepsy, nerve pain (neuropathy), and restless legs syndrome.
dosage: 300–3600mg daily in divided doses. Titrate slowly.

uses: Controls tonic-clonic and focal seizures.
dosage: 300–400mg daily in divided doses. Requires blood level monitoring.

uses: Replaces thyroid hormone in hypothyroidism (underactive thyroid).
dosage: 25–200mcg once daily, 30–60 minutes before breakfast on empty stomach.

uses: Treats malaria, lupus, and rheumatoid arthritis.
dosage: 200–400mg once daily with food.

uses: Reduces uric acid levels to prevent gout attacks and kidney stones.
dosage: 100–300mg once daily after meals.
side_effects: Skin rash (can be severe: SJS),Nausea,Liver changes,Kidney changes

uses: Treats acute gout attacks and prevents their recurrence.
dosage: 1.2mg at onset, then 0.6mg 1 hour later. Then 0.6mg daily to prevent.

uses: Prevents neural tube defects in pregnancy. Treats folic acid deficiency anemia.
dosage: 400mcg daily for prevention; 1–5mg daily for treatment.
side_effects: Generally very well tolerated,Rare: allergic reaction

uses: Treats and prevents vitamin D deficiency. Supports bone health and immune function.
dosage: 600–2000 IU daily for maintenance. Higher doses under doctor supervision.
side_effects: Toxicity in overdose: nausea, weakness, kidney damage

uses: Treats calcium deficiency. Prevents osteoporosis. Relieves acid indigestion.
dosage: 500–1200mg daily in divided doses with meals.

uses: Treats severe acne that hasn't responded to other treatments.
dosage: 0.5–1mg/kg/day for 4–6 months. Take with fatty meal.
side_effects: Very dry lips/skin,Elevated triglycerides,Liver stress,Severe birth defects

uses: Treats adrenal insufficiency, severe allergies, and inflammatory conditions.
dosage: 20–30mg daily in divided doses (replacement). Higher doses for emergencies.
side_effects: Weight gain,High blood sugar,Hypertension,Immune suppression,Bone loss

uses: Treats Parkinson's disease by converting to dopamine in the brain.
dosage: 100/25mg three times daily. Dose titrated up gradually.
